title: Gitcoin Grant
description: Schema for a Gitcoin grant representing a public goods funding project

active.description: Whether or not the Grant is active

slug.description: Slug for the Grant populated from title

reference_url.description: Associated reference URL of the Grant

logo.description: URL of the Grant logo image

admin_address.description: Wallet address of the Grant Admin where subscription funds will be sent

amount_received.description: Total amount of contributions received by the Grant in USDT/DAI

token_address.description: Address of the token to be used with the Grant

token_symbol.description: Type of token to be used with the Grant

network.description: Network in which the Grant contract resides

required_gas_price.description: Required gas price for the Grant

team_members.description: Array of team members contributing to this Grant

handle.description: GitHub handle/username associated with the Profile

keywords.description: Array of keywords associated with the Profile

position.description: Position of the Profile in the Weekly Earners leaderboard

avatar_url.description: URL to the Gitcoin Avatar of the Profile

total_earned.description: Sum of ETH collected by the profile

organizations.description: Dictionary containing profiles that this user works with
